poi.info:
[- KILL MOBS -]
Open Your Achievement Panel ► Character Adventure Guide > Adventure Guide Volume Three > [Defeating Elder Dragon Minions]
Kill icebrood here until you kill 100 and complete this achievement.
You may need to do a couple passes but when you are done go to the end of the main trail for a waypoint to continue to.

[- SPECIAL INSTRUCTIONS -] We will be completeing this entire zone.
• Please be sure not to skip ahead and follow the trail. • Be aware the first 1/3 of this zone will be the hardest part of the run in terms of staying alive. • Dont skip upgrading your gear! Upgrading is super helpful. • Using your warclaw when you get low to run around for a bit to regain health is good as well.
Dont get discouraged, you will ramp up quickly.

[- REMEMBER TO GATHER -]
Keep an eye out for harvest nodes. We need to harvest any node type 75 times in this zone.

[- REMEMBER TO GATHER -]
Keep an eye out for harvest nodes. We need to harvest any node type 75 times in this zone.

[- REMEMBER TO GATHER -]
Keep an eye out for harvest nodes. We need to harvest any node type 75 times in this zone.

[- WATCH FOR EVENTS -] Completing events is the only thing in this run we cant fully control.
That means watching for events constantly is crutual.
If you see an event, go to it, period. [Alt+Click] on the trail on the mini-map where you left off and come back after the event.
Also look for npc's that can start events and do those as well.

[- WATCH FOR EVENTS -] Completing events is the only thing in this run we cant fully control.
That means watching for events constantly is crutual.
If you see an event, go to it, period. [Alt+Click] on the trail on the mini-map where you left off and come back after the event.
Also look for npc's that can start events and do those as well.

[- WATCH FOR EVENTS -] Completing events is the only thing in this run we cant fully control.
That means watching for events constantly is crutual.
If you see an event, go to it, period. [Alt+Click] on the trail on the mini-map where you left off and come back after the event.
Also look for npc's that can start events and do those as well.

[- WATCH FOR EVENTS -] Completing events is the only thing in this run we cant fully control.
That means watching for events constantly is crutual.
If you see an event, go to it, period. [Alt+Click] on the trail on the mini-map where you left off and come back after the event.
Also look for npc's that can start events and do those as well.

[- WATCH FOR EVENTS -] Completing events is the only thing in this run we cant fully control.
That means watching for events constantly is crutual.
If you see an event, go to it, period. [Alt+Click] on the trail on the mini-map where you left off and come back after the event.
Also look for npc's that can start events and do those as well.

[- WATCH FOR EVENTS -] Completing events is the only thing in this run we cant fully control.
That means watching for events constantly is crutual.
If you see an event, go to it, period. [Alt+Click] on the trail on the mini-map where you left off and come back after the event.
Also look for npc's that can start events and do those as well.

[- WATCH FOR EVENTS -] Completing events is the only thing in this run we cant fully control.
That means watching for events constantly is crutual.
If you see an event, go to it, period. [Alt+Click] on the trail on the mini-map where you left off and come back after the event.
Also look for npc's that can start events and do those as well.

poi.tip-description: These Steps Are Not On The Route Must Also Be Completed While In This Zone!
These Steps Are Not On The Route Must Also Be Completed While In This Zone!

poi.info:
[- SELL / SALVAGE -]
Buy A [Basic Salvaging Kit] From The Vendor (If Needed). Salvage Any Items Not Needed & Sell What Cannot Be Salvaged To Vendor.
[- REMEMBER -] Keep All Luck! Do Not Sell Or Use!

[- SELL / SALVAGE -]
Buy A [Basic Salvaging Kit] From The Vendor (If Needed). Salvage Any Items Not Needed & Sell What Cannot Be Salvaged To Vendor.
[- REMEMBER -] Keep All Luck! Do Not Sell Or Use!

[- SELL / SALVAGE -]
Buy A [Basic Salvaging Kit] From The Vendor (If Needed). Salvage Any Items Not Needed & Sell What Cannot Be Salvaged To Vendor.
[- REMEMBER -] Keep All Luck! Do Not Sell Or Use!

[- PURCHASE UPGRADES / RESTOCK -]
Welcome To The Half-way Point In The Run. Depending On What Boosters/Buffs You Have You May Be Just A Bit Overleveled Or WAY Overleveled But Either Way You Probably Feel A Bit Squishy. So Take This Time To Fix That.
*** DO NOT SKIP DOING UPGRADES! ***
[- FOOD / UTILITY -] • Bowl of Candy Corn Custard • Quality Sharpening Stone
[- ARMOR / WEAPON UPGRADES -] This Process Will Always Be The Same • Click The Cog Icon • Make The Level Range -5/+1 Current Level • Click The First Dropdown And Select Power • Click The Fifth Dropdown And Select Fine • Sort By Price And Buy +What Is Cheapest +What Is Closest In Level • Click Through Each Category And Repeat
[- OPTIONAL ITEMS -] • (4) Rune of Vampirism • (2) Rune of the Warrior • (2) Sigil of Blood • (2) Sigil of Fire

[- PURCHASE UPGRADES / RESTOCK -]
Welcome To The Half-way Point In The Run. Depending On What Boosters/Buffs You Have You May Be Just A Bit Overleveled Or WAY Overleveled But Either Way You Probably Feel A Bit Squishy. So Take This Time To Fix That.
*** DO NOT SKIP DOING UPGRADES! ***
[- FOOD / UTILITY -] • Bowl of Candy Corn Custard • Quality Sharpening Stone
[- ARMOR / WEAPON UPGRADES -] This Process Will Always Be The Same • Click The Cog Icon • Make The Level Range -5/+1 Current Level • Click The First Dropdown And Select Power • Click The Fifth Dropdown And Select Fine • Sort By Price And Buy +What Is Cheapest +What Is Closest In Level • Click Through Each Category And Repeat
[- OPTIONAL ITEMS -] • (4) Major Rune of Vampirism • (2) Major Rune of the Warrior • (2) Major Sigil of Blood • (2) Major Sigil of Fire

[- DEPOSIT ALL MATERIALS -]
Use The [Deposit All Materials] Button In The Top Right Of Your Invintory.

[- USE DYE -]
Open Your Hero Panel, Go To Dyes, And Dye Any Piece Of Gear Any Color You Would Like.

[- SWAP WEAPONS -]
Weapon Swap 3 Times

[- TRAIN SKILLS -]
Open Your Hero Panel, Go To Training, And Train Some Skills.

[- STARTING HEART -]
Just Starting This Heart On Our Way To A Vista. No Need To Finish Right Now.
• Kill Animals • Open Traps • Revive Downed

[- STARTING HEART -]
Just Starting This Heart On Our Way To A Vista. No Need To Finish Right Now.
• Kill Animals • Open Traps • Revive Downed

[- FINISHING HEART -]
• Kill Animals • Open Traps • Revive Downed

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Interact With [Damaged Writing] • Kill Everything

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Interact With [Detour Markers] • Kill Jotun/Wolves • Revive Lionguards

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Interact With [Detour Markers] • Kill Jotun/Wolves • Revive Lionguards

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Interact With [Detour Markers] • Kill Jotun/Wolves • Revive Lionguards

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Interact With [Detour Markers] • Kill Jotun/Wolves • Revive Lionguards

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Kill Icebrood • Kill Wolves • Destroy Corrupted Ice Formations • Destroy Corrupted Ice Fragments

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Kill Icebrood • Kill Wolves • Destroy Corrupted Ice Formations • Destroy Corrupted Ice Fragments

[- STARTING HEART -]
• Kill Icebrood • Destroy Corrupted Ice Formations

[- FINISHING HEART -]
• Kill Icebrood • Destroy Corrupted Ice Formations • Revive Townsfolk
[- NOTE -] You May Have To Spend Some Time Looking Around For Things To Kill. Most Annoying Heart In The Zone. There Are A Few Events To Look Out For That Make It Easier.

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Gather [Arctic Kelp] • Kill Jellyfish
• Revive Everything

[- DODGING ATTACKS -]
The area ahead is a good spot to finishing the [Dodging Attacks] Section. Just wait for the mobs to drop ground aoes and dodge while inside of them.

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Kill Everything • Destroy Everything • Revive Everything

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Collect [Stolen Elixirs] • Destroy Grawl Idols • Interact With [Discarded Armor] • Kill Grawl
You can hand in [Stolen Elixirs] to the heart NPC to finish this heart if needed.

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Collect [Stolen Elixirs] • Destroy Grawl Idols • Interact With [Discarded Armor] • Kill Grawl
You can hand in [Stolen Elixirs] to the heart NPC to finish this heart if needed.

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Collect [Stolen Elixirs] • Destroy Grawl Idols • Interact With [Discarded Armor] • Kill Grawl
You can hand in [Stolen Elixirs] to the heart NPC to finish this heart if needed.

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Collect [Stolen Elixirs] • Destroy Grawl Idols • Interact With [Discarded Armor] • Kill Grawl
You can hand in [Stolen Elixirs] to the heart NPC to finish this heart if needed.

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Collect [Stolen Elixirs] • Destroy Grawl Idols • Interact With [Discarded Armor] • Kill Grawl
You can hand in [Stolen Elixirs] to the heart NPC to finish this heart if needed.

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Collect [Stolen Elixirs] • Destroy Grawl Idols • Interact With [Discarded Armor] • Kill Grawl
You can hand in [Stolen Elixirs] to the heart NPC to finish this heart if needed.

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Kill Everything • Destroy Everything • Collect [Durmand Priory Book]
You can hand in [Durmand Priory Book] to the heart NPC to finish this heart if needed.

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Kill Everything • Destroy Everything • Revive Everything • Talk to Wounded Seraph

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Kill Everything • Destroy Everything • Revive Everything • Talk to Wounded Seraph

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Kill Everything • Destroy Everything • Revive Everything • Talk to Wounded Seraph

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Kill Icebrood • Kill Sons of Svanir • Destroy Sons of Svanir Banners

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Kill Dredge • Destroy Gun Turrets

[- COMPLETE HEART -]
• Kill Everything • Revive Everything • Interact With NPCs
You can hand in any [Meat Hunk] to the chef NPC in the small town to finish this heart if needed.

[- HAND IN -]
Hand In Any [Grawl Potion] You Collect!

[- HAND IN -]
Hand In Any [Durmand Priory Book] You Have Collected.

[- HERO POINT -]
• The Answer To The Riddle Is +Whit • Drink The [Raven Tonic] You Recieved

[- PURCHASE TOOLS -]
• Purchase Basic Salvage Kit (If Needed) • Purchase Iron Harvesting Sickle • Purchase Iron Logging Axe • Purchase Iron Mining Pick
Salvage Any Items Not Needed & Sell What Cannot Be Salvaged To Vendor.
We Need To Harvest 75 Times In This Zone!
[- REMEMBER -] Keep All Luck! Do Not Sell Or Use!

[- REVIVE NPC -]
• Find An NPC To Revive (If Still Needed)
[- NOTE -] Last Spot To Revevive. Be Sure To Find An NPC To Revive Here Before Moving On.

poi.copy: Go To [&BHQBAAA=] and continue to Hoelbrak
Go To [&BI8DAAA=] and continue to Lion's Arch

poi.info:
[- VOLUME 1 FINISHED -]
Your [Adventure Guide: Volume One] Should Now Be Finished. If Its Not, Go To The Achievement And Finish It Up, Then Return Here To Continue.

[- STARTING VOLUME 2 -]
Starting [Adventure Guide: Volume Two] Now. Follow The --TEAL-- Trail.

[- STARTING VOLUME 3 -]
Starting [Adventure Guide: Volume Three] Now. Follow The --PINK-- Trail.
